name: karp-word-graph
description: Scripture study system with semantic search and personal knowledge graph. Search the Scriptures with meaning-based discovery, study notes, prayer journal, and visual graph. Your data stays local. KJV Bible pre-loaded with 31,102 verses and semantic embeddings — works instantly.

ui_port.title: Web UI Port
ui_port.description: Port for the local web UI (default: 3457). Open localhost:3457 in your browser.

ui_password.title: Web UI Password
ui_password.description: Protects your study graph web UI with a passphrase. If left blank, you'll be prompted on first visit.

tools.name: read_scripture
tools.description: Read specific scripture verses. Accepts references like 'John 3:16', 'Genesis 1:1-5', or 'Psalm 23'.

tools.name: search_scripture
tools.description: Semantic search across all scripture. Finds passages by meaning — e.g. 'hope in suffering', 'God's promises'.

tools.name: study_passage
tools.description: Deep study mode — verse text, surrounding context, your notes, prayers, and questions on a passage.

tools.name: study_history
tools.description: Review your study activity — notes, insights, prayers, questions, memory verses.

tools.name: scripture_status
tools.description: Check loaded scripture, verse counts, embedding coverage, study stats.

tools.name: list_books
tools.description: List all books of scripture with chapter and verse counts. Filter by testament.

tools.name: re_embed_scriptures
tools.description: Build or rebuild passage embeddings for semantic search.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store study notes, prayers, teachings, questions, insights, cross-references, or memory verses.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Semantic search across your personal study notes and knowledge graph.

tools.name: forget
tools.description: Delete a node from the knowledge graph by ID.

tools.name: update
tools.description: Edit an existing node's content, tags, or metadata.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Create a named relationship between two nodes.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Keyword search across node summaries and details.

tools.name: list
tools.description: Browse nodes by type, tags, or date range.

tools.name: kg_status
tools.description: Knowledge graph health: node counts, DB size, embedding coverage.

tools.name: propose_node_type
tools.description: Propose a new custom node type with fields.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Create a backup snapshot of the entire knowledge graph.

tools.name: re_embed
tools.description: Rebuild all vector embeddings for the knowledge graph.
